generic_rules: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if-then-else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators for contract logic
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside annex agree blocks
Use assign only for existing output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation scope
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not use invalid AGREE type names (use int, real, bool instead)
